text: Here's what science actually says about retrieval practice. It's more than just recalling facts. It shapes how we learn and remember. Studies show that actively retrieving information strengthens memory connections. One recent study found a 30% boost in recall after retrieval practice sessions. But not all retrieval is equal. Quality matters! Engaging with material over time, like spaced repetition, maximizes the benefits. Want to improve your memory? Try retrieval practice today!
